zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard L'Aigle於1100年出生在法國諾門迪奧內利艾格爾時，他的父親Gilbert de  L'Aigle31歲，母親Juliana du Perche26歲。他和Beatrix D'Estouteville至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1176年在法國巴-諾門迪奧內利艾格爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard L'Aigle于1100年出生在法国諾門迪奧內利艾格爾时，他的父亲Gilbert de  L'Aigle31岁，母亲Juliana du Perche26岁。他和Beatrix D'Estouteville至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1176年在法国巴-諾門迪奧內利艾格爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: L'Aigle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Gotthilf.
German: variant of Faigl, a southern short form of Veilchen, the name of the flower violet.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard L'Aigle was born in 1100, in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, was 31 and his mother, Juliana du Perche, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Beatrix D'Estouteville. He died in 1176, in L'Aigle, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard L'Aigle est né en 1100, à L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Juliana du Perche, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Beatrix D'Estouteville. Il est décédé en 1176, à L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard L'Aigle 1100 in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de  L'Aigle 31 und seine Mutter Juliana du Perche 26. Er hatte mit Beatrix D'Estouteville mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1176 im Alter von 76 Jahren in L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard L'Aigle è nato il nel 1100 nel L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Juliana du Perche, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Beatrix D'Estouteville. Morì nel 1176, nel L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard L'Aigleが1100年にフランスノーマンディオルンル'アイグルで生まれた時，父Gilbert de  L'Aigleは31歳，母Juliana du Percheは26歳であった。彼はBeatrix D'Estoutevilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1176年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンル'アイグルで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard L'Aigle(이)가 1100년 프랑스 노먼디 른 '아익일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de  L'Aigle(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana du Perche(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Beatrix D'Estouteville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 '아익일에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard L'Aigle nasceu em 1100, em L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Juliana du Perche, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Beatrix D'Estouteville. Ele faleceu em 1176, em L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard L'Aigle родился в 1100 г. в местности л'еигл, орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilbert de  L'Aigle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana du Perche, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Beatrix D'Estouteville. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности л'еигл, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard L'Aigle nació en 1100, en L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Gilbert de  L'Aigle, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Juliana du Perche, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Beatrix D'Estouteville. Murió en 1176, en L'Aigle, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
